name: com.nexoider.coreaiunity
description: Unity layer for CoreAI: unified MEAI pipeline, CoreAISettingsAsset, LLM backend switching, WorldCommand tool, CoreAi singleton API, Control API (StopAgent, ClearContext, OnToolExecuted), ForcedToolMode, per-agent MaxOutputTokens, TryRepairToolName, HTTP retry with Retry-After. Depends on com.nexoider.coreai 1.4.0+.
